AuthorityDocuments.description: Laws, regulations and standards that define requirements
AuthorityDocuments.sourceType: Government statute/regulation or Standards body publication
AuthorityDocuments.accessMethod: Public (e.g., published law or regulation); membership or purchase required for some standards
AuthorityDocuments.parsingApproach: Text extraction from HTML/PDF (preserve structure, sections)

InterpretationDocuments.description: Guidance and interpretative materials clarifying requirements
InterpretationDocuments.sourceType: Regulatory agency guidance, policy memoranda; industry guidelines/white papers
InterpretationDocuments.accessMethod: Public if issued by authorities; sometimes member-only or internal for industry analyses
InterpretationDocuments.parsingApproach: Text extraction with reference linking (connect to relevant Authority docs)

ImplementationArtifacts.description: Internal policies, procedures, and controls implementing compliance
ImplementationArtifacts.sourceType: Company SOPs, compliance manuals, process documents, training materials
ImplementationArtifacts.accessMethod: Confidential (internal use); shared with regulators or partners under NDA if required
ImplementationArtifacts.parsingApproach: Unstructured text or OCR if scanned (often not standardized format)

VerificationEvidence.description: Records and reports evidencing compliance in practice (audits, inspections, tests)
VerificationEvidence.sourceType: Audit reports, inspection checklists, test results, certifications from third parties or regulators
VerificationEvidence.accessMethod: Internal or regulator-issued (not broadly public unless via FOIA or summary data releases)
VerificationEvidence.parsingApproach: OCR for scanned reports; structured data extraction for forms and quantitative results

EnforcementSignals.description: Indicators and records of enforcement actions or compliance failures
EnforcementSignals.sourceType: Regulatory enforcement databases, legal notices, penalty orders, incident reports/press releases
EnforcementSignals.accessMethod: Public in many cases (regulator press releases, court records); some internal incident reports are confidential
EnforcementSignals.parsingApproach: Scrape text from web sources or legal docs; use NLP to identify entities (violations, penalties, dates)
